metadata.description: Agent-building practices from Anthropic's engineering blog, packaged as installable Claude Code components.

plugins.name: agent-stdlib
plugins.description: Skills distilled from Anthropic's engineering blog, research, and docs: building evals, calibrating eval infrastructure, preventing reward hacking, auditing agent behavior, coding-agent tool design, advanced tool use, durable agent architecture, agent reliability and change management, sandboxing, defending against prompt injection, constitutional classifiers, the think step, multi-agent orchestration, and parallel autonomous agents, plus MCP servers and hooks for tool-gating and prompt-injection screening.
